_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis type 1-dependent alterations in mouse microglia function are not cell-intrinsic.

_contextSnippet: Consistent with a heterozygous Nf1 mutation, there was a ~ 50% reduction in neurofibromin expression in Nf1± relative to WT microglia (male: p = 0.0006; female: p = 0.0003)
details: ~50% reduction in neurofibromin expression in Nf1± relative to WT microglia (male: p = 0.0006; female: p = 0.0003)
